title: Chain-level linear working buffer for stacked color filters (REAL Color_Panels fix)
goal: Teach the layer render loop (renderCloneLayer, renderDrawableLayer in compositor/index.ts) to keep a Float32 LINEAR working buffer across a multi-filter chain when ALL filters in that chain support linear (Colorize + HueSat + Tint + ChannelMixer + Brightness already have partial linear branches). Linearize ONCE at chain entry, all filters operate in linear light, encode ONCE at chain exit — NOT per-filter re-encode (the per-filter version REGRESSED Curtains -0.42/Slide -0.76/Up-Over -0.52, documented in filters/channel-mixer.ts:315-322). Gate behind isLinearCompositeEnabled(). DECODE CONFIRMED by T-qba9797b8: CP chain is Colorize->HueSat (post-reverse); sRGB-Colorize gives red-panel pixel (109,46,29)->HueSat sf=2->(160,33,0)=engine; linear-Colorize alone gives (103,40,26) matching GT ratio (72,33,24). DoD: Color_Panels moves toward GT (>=18.5) with 0 regressions on Curtains/Slide/Up-Over (the per-filter failure mode). This is a compositor architecture change (T-D1+T-D2a-d subsystem), not a filter-file fix — full lifecycle, may span multiple gate-green WIP increments. COLLISION: touches compositor/index.ts render loop — coordinate; ideally run when the 4 current compositor editors (Concentric/Close_and_Open/Video_Wall/3D_Rect) have landed.
notes: Surfaced by T-qba9797b8 NOCHANGE. The genuine Color_Panels fix. High leverage: likely helps all Colorize-stack slugs. | DECODE COMPLETE 2026-07-18: (1) Colorize faithful headless = out=255*(s2l(black)+luma*(s2l(white)-s2l(black))), luma=Rec709 on sRGB CODE values (grayscale 43.8 dB vs 33.6 for 709-on-linear); 47-56 dB isolated (flat-white endpoint sweep: 0.25->13.0 = s2l exact). CRITICAL: a linear-buffer chain must compute Colorize luma from the sRGB-ENCODED codes, not the linear buffer. (2) Brightness faithful = linear multiply (encode-once). (3) ChannelMixer Mono = red-row weighted sum. Curtains apply-order ChannelMixer->Brightness->Colorize needs ChannelMixer SEED, Brightness RESUME, Colorize RESUME+encode-once. RISK: per-filter s2l historically regressed GUI gate (Curtains -0.42 / Slide -0.76 / Up-Over -0.52); the encode-once CHAIN may fix that but MUST be gate-measured; the headless!=GUI split means GUI GT may still prefer raw. Build+measure, revert if net-neg. | MEASURED-REFUTED 2026-07-18: the linear-CHAIN will NOT close the color gap against the GUI gate. Direct test — s2l endpoints on the CURRENT baseline regressed ALL 7 Colorize slugs (NET -11.4 dB: Up-Over -6.68, Curtains -2.47, Slide -0.80, ...). CRITICALLY, Stylized__Slide is a LONE Colorize (no chain) and STILL regresses -0.80, proving the split is NOT a stacked encode-once artifact but a fundamental FCP-GUI-export != FCP-headless colour-management difference. The GUI GT (Rule 1) prefers RAW endpoints; the linear chain (encode-once) would still emit s2l-linearised values that the GUI gate rejects. So this task is NOT the path to the color family on the gate. Keeping RAW endpoints is correct. Recommend DROP unless the scoring truth changes from GUI GT to headless.
